steps.title: Add like terms
steps.content:
Line up the two expressions and combine matching powers of $s$:
$$(4s^4-5s)+(2s^4+11s+7)$$
The $s^4$ terms give $6s^4$, the $s$ terms give $-5s+11s=6s$, and the constant is $7$.

steps.title: Read b from the required form
steps.content: The sum is $$6s^4+6s+7.$$ In the form $as^4+bs+c$, the coefficient of $s$ is $b=6$. The answer is 6.
